title: centaurea theryi
intro: Centaurea theryi, also known as the Cornflower, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Centaurea theryi include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Centaurea theryi include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
